name: Tribhuvan University
description: Nepal's oldest and largest public university with a broad academic network across the country.

name: Kathmandu University
description: A leading private university known for a strong academic reputation, research focus, and modern campus setting.

name: Pokhara University
description: A growing university offering professional programs with an accessible city environment.

name: Purbanchal University
description: A public university with a diverse range of affiliated programs and regional reach.

name: Nepal Open University
description: A flexible learning university designed for distance and open education pathways.

name: Mid-West University
description: A public university supporting regional higher education and professional development.

name: Far-Western University
description: A public university serving western Nepal with expanding academic programs.

name: Lumbini Buddhist University
description: A specialized university with strengths in Buddhist studies, humanities, and cultural subjects.

name: Agriculture and Forestry University
description: A specialized university focused on agricultural science, veterinary studies, and forestry.

name: Nepal Sanskrit University
description: A public university known for Sanskrit, traditional studies, and cultural disciplines.
